task: Review the current uncommitted diff limited to the implementation for: (1) structured Nix update detection and rollback/locking, (2) centralized race-free brightness changes in QML, and (4) replacing 10-second update process polling with 30-minute polling. Read all relevant current files. Do not modify anything. Focus on concrete correctness bugs, shell lifecycle/trap/locking issues, QML Process event ordering and rapid wheel behavior, and whether tests are sufficient. Separate blockers from optional improvements. Existing unrelated repository changes must not be reviewed. Return concise findings with file/line references.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
